name: swarm
description: Swarm shared context bus — connects the hosted Swarm MCP server, teaches the load-at-start / checkpoint-at-end ritual, and ships the skill for loading, checkpointing, onboarding, curation, handoffs, dispatch, and the Projects produce-loop.

interface.shortDescription: Shared context bus for your AI sessions.
interface.longDescription: Swarm is shared memory for your coding sessions. Load what other sessions already know at the start of a task, checkpoint your work at the end, and curate durable knowledge into channel records — so context travels with you and your team.
defaultPrompt: Load Swarm context for this project.
What does Swarm already know about this?
